## Summary

Describe the change and the use case it supports.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build or tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] No emoji in code, logging, messages or documentation
- [ ] Editing inputs keep the white #ffffff background
